intended_use: Strain AI is intended for noninvasive processing of cardiac ultrasound images to provide measurements of global longitudinal strain of adult patients with suspected disease.
intended_use_full: Strain AI is intended for noninvasive processing of cardiac ultrasound images to provide measurements of global longitudinal strain of adult patients with suspected disease.
target_condition: cardiac disease (suspected disease in adult patients)
ground_truth: Reference device (Us2.v2, K233676) used to obtain ground truth reference data
